outline.caption: Master the art of reading student files in under three minutes with our proven scan pattern. Eligibility, remaining benefits, holds, and last certification ,  all in one swift look. Watch the full tutorial and download the template.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is 'Last Certification' as it could benefit from a more concise headline to match the others.
